title: RBSE 12th Result LIVE: Official website still down; here's how to check results on HT and indiaresults.com
description: RBSE 12th Result LIVE: The Rajasthan Board Class 12 results have been declared on rajeduboard.rajasthan.gov.in. for all streams. Candidates can also check results on the HT Education page. A step-by-step guide to check the results is available below.
